name: Zakuro
message: "Ah... Mamiya-kun."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, hello."

name: Zakuro
message: "Are you wasting time again today?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, something like that, but, uh..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, yes. I'm Takashima Zakuro."

name: Mamiya
message: "Ahahaha, no. I remembered it this time."

name: Zakuro
message: "Really?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I was just thinking about asking what's going on today. That's a big package."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh this? This is..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm? A lunchbox?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. Would you like to eat it together? I haven't had lunch yet."

name: Mamiya
message: "It's not even lunchtime yet."

name: Zakuro
message: "Did you have other plans?"

name: Mamiya
message: "No, I was just going to buy some bread at the store...
You sure you don't mind?"

name: Zakuro
message: "If you don't like it, I won't make you eat it."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh? That's an awfully lavish lunchbox... This looks like Thanksgiving, not an early lunch."

name: Zakuro
message: "Really? Is there a problem?"

name: Mamiya
message: "There's no problem. It looks great, though. I hope it tastes good, too."

name: Zakuro
message: "I wouldn't know. Why don't you try it?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Well then, I'll take you up on your offer."
The test.
I'm pretty confident in my cooking... though no one but my parents has ever eaten it before.
They always say it's good, but maybe their taste buds are just malfunctioning.
What if everyone else thinks it's terrible? That kind of thing happens all the time in manga...
His chopsticks went to the fried food first.
Oh no!
I never tasted them to see if they would still taste good after a few hours had passed!
I only tasted them when they were fresh! And the spring rolls too...
Maybe the spring rolls taste terrible if you let them cool down...
Aah.
If I had just made plain ones I wouldn't have to worry. But plain ones would probably go bad since it's so hot out. Oh, what should I do...
Aah!
He's eating it, he's really eating it!
I'm getting too excited! Come on, I sound like a girl in some eroge! But that isn't what I should be worried about right now!

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm... Amph... Hmm, mm..."
He's just eating. He's not saying anything...
Does that mean it's all right?
No!
When I eat something I don't like, I just eat it as fast as possible so I don't have to taste it.
Is that what he's doing?
If so...

name: Zakuro
message: "A-Aha... You don't have to force yourself."

name: Mamiya
message: "Eh? What do you mean?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, uh, if you don't like it, you don't have to eat it."

name: Mamiya
message: "Does it look like I don't like it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, well... I'm not sure. How is it?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Honestly, I was surprised... This is really good. It feels like I'm eating out at a nice restaurant."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? R-Really?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, I was really surprised. It all tastes good, and there's a lot of variety."

name: Zakuro
message: "Really? I'm glad you like it."

name: Mamiya
message: The spring rolls are amazing. They're stuffed with cheese, aren't they?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I thought they might not be any good after they cooled down. Are they really still good?"

name: Mamiya
message: "No way, they're really good."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's Camembert cheese. My father always liked that kind of cheese..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Your father? Oh, the same person who recommended Garcia Marquez to you?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah, he really likes to read... though he usually reads science fiction and mysteries."

name: Mamiya
message: "Sounds like he has some good taste. I'd like to see his bookshelf."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, it kind of looks like yours."
Though there aren't any light novels or manga...

name: Mamiya
message: "Eh? My bookshelf?"

name: Mamiya
message: "How do you know about my bookshelf?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Um, in the secret underground room..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Secret underground room?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh... I-It's nothing!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Um, you mean..."
Why doesn't he remember it?
He really can't remember something from just a few days ago? It didn't really look like he was playing dumb...
He acted like he really didn't remember.

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, besides that."
The atmosphere is heavy... I have to change the topic.

name: Zakuro
message: "What was the song you played for me the other day?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Like I said, I can't tell you that. That's for you to figure out."

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Oh, I see..."
Every time I talk to him... I just find more questions.
The way he talks, his personality, and his knowledge... It seems to change all the time.
Maybe it's just depends on what mood he's in? Or maybe he's just playing with me...
I've heard some strange rumors about him too.
There were so many different rumors about him that it was hard to even believe that they were all talking about the same person.
At first, he was bullied, just like I was, but now no one even thinks about bullying him.
At the very least, I heard about one famous incident involving him.
It involved people from this school as well as some gang members from another school, and he was at the center of the incident.
He was clearly acting in self-defense, since several people ganged up on him. That's the only reason he wasn't expelled.
Apparently all the people that tried to fight him ended up in the hospital.
Apparently they instigated it, and he was just the victim.
People think that he's the most violent and dangerous person in the school.
Everyone is afraid of him...
And yet...
Why is he so peaceful and calm right now?
He reads French plays on the rooftop... and at night he plays the piano at a bar.
He knows all sorts of stuff... and he's always kind... If there ever was a perfect, Renaissance man in the world, he would be it.
But...
He...
Sometimes he seems incredibly weak and bitter... and afraid. Just like me.
And the writing on the wall underground looked almost demonic... That was really scary, and honestly kind of disgusting.
And still other times... he's a violent man that everyone in the school fears...
Which one is real?

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm? What is it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, I-I'm sorry!"
It doesn't matter which one is real...
I just want to be with him a little longer, just the way he is right now... That's all.
I just want to get closer to him... That's all.
He happily ate all the food I made for him.
He really is a kind person.
I wish I had been born as such a wonderful person.

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah... Kimika..."

name: Kimika
message: "Zakuro... Was that Mamiya Takuji?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Uh, yeah..."

name: Kimika
message: "Mamiya Takuji, huh... What, have you been getting along with him lately?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, uh, it's not like that..."

name: Kimika
message: "It's not like that, huh... Even though you made him lunch?"

name: Kimika
message: "Well, whatever you say... Still, you should be careful around him."

name: Zakuro
message: "...Yeah, I know that."

name: Kimika
message: "Hmm... So even you can figure that much out."

name: Zakuro
message: "What?"

name: Kimika
message: "Well, it's just a rumor... I don't really know anything about him."
After saying that, Kimika walked away.
That was an awfully candid conversation.
Tachibana Kimika.
She's a strange person.
I was in the same class as her in elementary school.
But I transferred to a different school... I didn't see her again for a long time.
After that, I changed schools a few more times, and then I ultimately got into Kita High, where I ended up in the same class as her again.
I was so happy to see her that I tried to make friends with her again.
Maybe I shouldn't have done that... Ever since then, I've been bullied too.
I guess Kimika was originally the target of most of the bullying here... and when I showed up, I became the new target.
I haven't talked to Kimika one on one like that in a long time... What should I do? Should I just let it go?
I'm not really sure what she's thinking...
When she walked off just now, her attitude seemed to be screaming, "And don't follow me!"
Maybe she was angry about something?
Now that I think of it, back when Kimika was being bullied... she always got angry at me for talking to her.
Back then, I didn't understand why.
She must have been mad at me for being so stupid.

name: Zakuro
message: "Um... I forgot something..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? I-Is someone there?"

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um... Are you staying late and studying?"
I slowly moved toward the noise I heard.

name: Kimika
message: "Don't come near me..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? That voice..."

name: Kimika
message: "Right now... I want to be alone..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What happened?"

name: Kimika
message: "I-I said get away!"
Kimika was curled up in the corner of the classroom...
She was completely soaked... and for some reason she wasn't wearing any clothes...
Why would she be naked in a place like this?

name: Kimika
message: "You shouldn't get involved with me. It has nothing to do with you."

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What do you mean nothing to do with me... What happened?"

name: Kimika
message: "I got wet in the rain, so I set my clothes out to dry... and then the wind carried my clothes off somewhere."

name: Zakuro
message: "What? That's impossible. It didn't even rain today."

name: Kimika
message: "It did rain, but just on me. Is that good enough for you? Now leave me alone... Achoo."

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-That's no good. You're sneezing. You're going to catch a cold."

name: Kimika
message: "I'll be fine. Leave me alone... I want to be naked for a little while longer."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? Why?"

name: Kimika
message: "Who knows... Maybe I'm an exhibitionist... I love the thrill when I don't know whether someone's going to see me or not."

name: Zakuro
message: "But now I've seen you..."

name: Kimika
message: "Then forget it. Pretend it never happened. We'll start over from scratch."

name: Zakuro
message: "Besides, why are you wet? I don't think an exhibitionist would do that..."

name: Kimika
message: "Th-That's... because I feel like a dirty girl when I'm all wet, you know?"

name: Zakuro
message: "But you're dirty, too... That must have been water from a mop bucket."

name: Kimika
message: "Shut up, shut up! Just shut the hell up, Zakuro!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? Okay..."

name: Kimika
message: "You know, Zakuro... I keep telling you, nothing good will come of associating with me. Stay away from me."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's not the problem right now... Uh, where are your clothes."
I looked for Kimika's clothes.
They weren't anywhere in the classroom... Wait, of course they aren't. If they were here, Kimika wouldn't be sitting there naked.

name: Zakuro
message: "Um... Oh."
The window sill behind her was wet too... That was probably where they dumped the water on her.
Which means...
I looked out the window and surveyed the schoolyard... There was a good chance someone threw her clothes out this window.

name: Kimika
message: "Zakuro, that's enough..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-There they are!"
The wind carried them for a little while and dumped them in a flower bed by the school.

name: Kimika
message: "Zakuro... You're overdoing it. I don't want you to do that."
Kimika said something, but I was already running out the door to get her clothes.
If I didn't hurry, they would get blown away.

name: Zakuro
message: "Your clothes aren't wet, at least."

name: Kimika
message: "They made me take them off before they dumped the water on me."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's good."

name: Kimika
message: "It's not good at all."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Kimika
message: "Do you know what's going to happen if you keep doing this?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Doing what?"

name: Kimika
message: "Everyone in the class has always ignored me... except for one stupid girl who transferred in. You keep breaking the taboo."

name: Zakuro
message: "What's going to happen?"

name: Kimika
message: "You'll definitely get bullied too."

name: Zakuro
message: "...Will I?"

name: Kimika
message: "That's right... In this classroom, I'm nothing more than a worm."

name: Zakuro
message: "You don't look like a worm to me."

name: Kimika
message: "Idiot..."

name: Kimika
message: "...Guilt."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"

name: Kimika
message: "You've never thought about that, have you? You're too stupid to understand that word."

name: Kimika
message: "If you get bullied too, I'll feel guilty, and then I'll just..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? What do you mean?"

name: Kimika
message: "I'm joking, but...
Well, sometimes a smile can be crueler than a fist. Remember that."

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Okay..."

name: Kimika
message: "It's especially cruel for people like me... People who aren't used to kindness..."

name: Kimika
message: "So stay away from me."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, okay..."
The result was just as expected.
It was just like she told me.
I started to get bullied just like her.
The two of us were almost always bullied at the same time.
But they didn't bully me nearly as badly... Kimika always tried to make the bullies mad so they would focus on her instead of bullying me.
She tried to draw their attention to herself.
Kimika was always mad about that.
And I can't blame her... My presence didn't alleviate any of the bullying she received. I actually made it worse for her.
Now that I think of it, back then...
When Akasaka-san tried to throw away the doll Kimika gave me as a present... she was angry about that too...

name: Megu
message: "Come on, get rid of that thing already."

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I can't throw it away. This is..."

name: Megu
message: "It matches with Tachibana's right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? No..."

name: Megu
message: "It does! Look, this is the same as the one Tachibana always used to carry around!"

name: Megu
message: "Though she never puts it on her phone strap anymore, ever since you got that one."
Y-You're misunderstanding something. Kimika gave this to me... It's the same one Kimika had before.
It's a rare version, so I was jealous, and then... she slipped it into my bag one day.
It's supposed to be a panda, but for some reason it's all black... like someone painted it black. It's cute even though the color is a bit odd.

name: Megu
message: "You're such a bitch, Tachibana."
The two of them kicked Kimika as she laid on the ground.
Akasaka is always a lot meaner to Kimika than to me.

name: Kimika
message: "Hehehe... That's right. I'm a bitch. That should be obvious by now... right, Zakuro?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? N-No, not at―"

name: Megu
message: "This doll is the reason why everyone in the class started ignoring you too, Takashima... You're such a dumb bitch."

name: Kimika
message: "That's not true... Zakuro isn't dumb, she's just too kind."

name: Megu
message: "Huh?"
Unlike me, Kimika never gives in... She never backs down even when they're bullying her.
Back when they first started bullying me, she probably could've turned around and bullied me alongside them. Then she would've been released from this hell, but her attitude never changed at all.
Though she didn't act friendly toward me either.
Back then... they didn't take the panda doll away from me because Kimika butted in and drew the attention to herself.
Akasaka-san believed that Kimika had painted it black... though it was black from the very beginning. Her memory isn't so good, is it?
The topic of the panda doll came up several other times after that, and Akasaka ultimately threw it off the rooftop.
She suddenly took it from me and threw it.
She did it so quickly that I immediately reached out to grab it when she threw it. I lost my balance and fell from the rooftop.
My injuries took two months to heal.
It really hurt... I broke a few bones, and it was boring in the hospital. It was a major hassle all around.
But thanks to that incident... the bullying stopped.
I have a long history with that doll.
I don't want anything like that to happen again, so I don't take it out of my room anymore.
I still have it, though.
While I was in the hospital... Kimika found it for me, and she came to give it to me while I was still recovering.
She always gets mad at me, but she really is a nice girl at heart.
She can be cold, but still... she's very kind.
She's the only one who never treats me differently.
Maybe she's a bully, but... I love her.

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um... Kimika."

name: Kimika
message: "Don't follow me."

name: Zakuro
message: "B-But..."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, and let me give you some advice."
Kimika didn't even turn to face me as she spoke.

name: Kimika
message: "The two of us shouldn't be alone together... At least for now, you should be careful about that."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? Why?"

name: Kimika
message: "You really are stupid...
You're a shit. You're just shit. You're such shit, Zakuro... Hehehe."

name: Zakuro
message: "Why would you say that?"

name: Kimika
message: "I think Akasaka Megu and Kitami Satoko have been planning something lately..."

name: Kimika
message: "I bet they'll get suspicious of us. If they see the two of us together..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Really?"

name: Kimika
message: "You should be careful...
But you're a bit thickheaded, so you probably won't listen anyway."

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What do you mean thickheaded?"

name: Kimika
message: "You are... You're super, super, super friggin' thickheaded."

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-That's mean..."

name: Kimika
message: "Super, super, super, super, super, super, super, super, super thickheaded."

name: Zakuro
message: "You don't need to say it that many times."

name: Kimika
message: "Hehehehehe... Super x 1,000 + thickheaded = Zakuro."

name: Zakuro
message: "Why would you say that?"

name: Kimika
message: "Who knows? Maybe it's because I hate you?"

name: Zakuro
message: "You're mean..."

name: Kimika
message: "If that's what you think of me,
then don't follow me."

name: Zakuro
message: "Hmph... Fine, then."

name: Kimika
message: "I told you before, Zakuro."

name: Zakuro
message: "Before?"

name: Kimika
message: "Guilt... Planting the seeds of guilt is much crueler than simple bullying could ever be... and that's what you did to me."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahahahaha... It turned out just like you said, didn't it..."

name: Zakuro
message: "It didn't even alleviate any of the bullying you received. I just got added on as a side dish."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, now I just have more stuff to worry about."

name: Zakuro
message: "To worry about?"

name: Kimika
message: "It's a pain how I have to worry about you instead of just myself."

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I'm sorry..."
It's true. She always tries to stop them from bullying me, even when it makes it worse for her.

name: Kimika
message: "Hehehe... If you want to apologize, you should probably get down on your hands and knees."

name: Zakuro
message: "I-If that's what you want, then..."

name: Kimika
message: "You're always like that...
Why don't you just do what you think is right for a change?"

name: Zakuro
message: "But I really do feel bad for you."

name: Kimika
message: "Then get down on your hands and knees and lick my feet."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? Wait, seriously?"

name: Kimika
message: "No."

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Oh... Good..."

name: Kimika
message: "Why would you take that seriously? Has your brain rotted away or what?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Of course not. I'd die if that happened."

name: Kimika
message: "Who knows, maybe you wouldn't."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Why?"

name: Kimika
message: "Because you're an idiot."

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-That's mean..."

name: Kimika
message: "Your head is so messed up that you wouldn't even notice a difference."

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-You don't need to explain it!"

name: Kimika
message: "You shouldn't go along with everything anyone else says. You have to make up your own mind and get away... Otherwise, bad things can happen."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh... Okay..."

name: Kimika
message: "Well, whatever...
You seem like you're finally enjoying life, after all."

name: Zakuro
message: "E-Enjoying life?"

name: Kimika
message: "I mean you look like you're actually happy now."

name: Zakuro
message: "No, I know that, but, what do you mean?"

name: Kimika
message: "Shut up... Shoo, shoo, get away from me with that stupid smile of yours."

name: Zakuro
message: "Stupid smile? Wait, Kimika!"

name: Kimika
message: "You've been grinning all the time lately. It's really creepy."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Really? I was smiling?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah... You've looked really happy for the past few days. It makes your face look creepy."

name: Zakuro
message: "Creepy? My face has always looked like this..."

name: Kimika
message: "Hehehe... That's not what I mean. That's why people always pick on you, Zakuro."

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What are you talking about?"

name: Kimika
message: "You don't know? The real reason so many people bully you is because you're cute."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? Why do you think that?"

name: Kimika
message: "I was the first one, though."

name: Zakuro
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Kimika
message: "Do you know Shiroyama Tsubasa?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, he skips class... and the rumors about him are really scary."

name: Kimika
message: "Shiroyama and Akasaka Megu are dating."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, that's right. So then, what about it?"

name: Kimika
message: "Shiroyama Tsubasa said I was cute in front of Megu... and then when he saw you, he said the exact same thing."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? R-Really? But what does that have to do with the people bullying us?"

name: Kimika
message: "They're jealous, you know?
Well, either way, Akasaka Megu is super rich, and Kitami Satoko is the most violent girl in the school... Now that they've picked us out from the pack, there's nothing we can do."

name: Kimika
message: "Though I'm a stupid girl who doesn't care what those bitches think, and you're an airhead who doesn't know the difference... I guess we reap what we sow."

name: Zakuro
message: "What does that have to do with anything?"

name: Kimika
message: "Well, whatever...
Zakuro."

name: Zakuro
message: "Hmm?"

name: Kimika
message: "You should go ahead and be happy. Don't come back to me."

name: Zakuro
message: "Come back?"

name: Kimika
message: "Be careful you don't attract the attention of those two girls again."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, that's it. Zakuro, you should go on and live a happy life."

name: Kimika
message: "Then my guilt will disappear too."

name: Zakuro
message: "Guilt? But I―"

name: Kimika
message: "It's my fault you ended up falling from Building C... If you had never talked to me, that wouldn't have happened to you."

name: Zakuro
message: "But that was..."

name: Kimika
message: "Just shut up. We've talked about that enough."

name: Zakuro
message: "A-All right..."

name: Kimika
message: "I'll take the initiative. I'll try to draw their attention. All you have to do is run."

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I can't do that."

name: Kimika
message: "Just shut up, you dumbass."

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-That's mean... You don't have to say it like that."

name: Kimika
message: "I said it because you wouldn't shut up... I'm just trying to tell you to shut your trap and listen to me for once."

name: Zakuro
message: "B-But you said I shouldn't go along with everything anyone else says... and now you're telling me to shut up and do what you say..."

name: Kimika
message: "For once,
you make a good point, Zakuro."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ow! Wh-Why did you hit me?"

name: Kimika
message: "Jeez, you have to do that all the time. If you say what's on your mind, people won't take advantage of you."

name: Zakuro
message: "So then why did you hit me?"

name: Kimika
message: "Because you don't fight back against anyone but me."

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-That doesn't make sense..."

name: Kimika
message: "It does... I hear that's what happens when you date a guy, too. You get knocked around just like that."

name: Zakuro
message: "Where did you hear that? I don't think that's normal."

name: Kimika
message: "Damens Walker!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Like I said, that's not a good source of information."

name: Kimika
message: "Better than those Cobalt Magazine books you read..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Sh-Shut up, jeez."
Kimika suddenly kicked me... and then pushed me into an empty classroom.

name: Zakuro
message: "K-Kimika, that was mea―"
My mouth snapped shut.
Kimika glared daggers at me, telling me to shut up.
I put my hand over my mouth and didn't say another word.

name: Megu
message: "Oh, if it isn't Tachibana. We were looking for you."

name: Satoko
message: "So this is where you were."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, this is where I was."

name: Megu
message: "We're going to skip the next class. Come with us."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, I'll go with you guys..."
Kimika is protecting me... again...
Why does she always protect me like this?
She's kind of mysterious.
I returned to the classroom after that.
I'm glad I got to talk to Mamiya-kun again today.
I wish these days could go on forever.
Those thoughts filled my head.
